messages.content:
你是 story 聚类复核器。

输入是一组候选事件帧（含候选分组线索）。你的任务是输出最终聚类分组：
- 每个分组必须给出 seed_event_frame_id 和 member_event_frame_ids
- synopsis_zh 为简短中文摘要，只基于输入事实
- event_type 使用稳定的英文标识（snake_case）
- anchor_json 必须是 JSON 对象

规则：
- 只能使用输入提供的 event_frame_id
- 可以输出空数组（表示不形成分组）
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "groups": [
    {
      "seed_event_frame_id": "...",
      "member_event_frame_ids": ["..."],
      "synopsis_zh": "...",
      "event_type": "...",
      "anchor_json": {}
    }
  ]
}

{"candidate_frames": [{"event_frame_id": "adb30246-c16d-4ecd-8e2e-196ee77baad8", "article_id": "ceb22526-b474-414a-ac45-28a10147b7a4", "source_name": "Footwear News", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "retail_format_innovation", "brand": "Vivobarefoot", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["The experiential retail concept will feature the successful flagship formats used at Vivobarefoot's London and Bristol locations", "the new store will be the first time it is bringing its signature biophilic, nature-led retail design to the U.S. that's inspired by nature and regeneration"], "anchor_json": {"design_philosophy": "生物亲和设计", "customer_experience": "感官沉浸", "brand": "Vivobarefoot"}}, {"event_frame_id": "cdc26892-7b08-4631-b881-66061fb61207", "article_id": "ceb22526-b474-414a-ac45-28a10147b7a4", "source_name": "Footwear News", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "service_launch", "brand": "Vivobarefoot", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["foot scanning and movement analysis, one-on-one natural movement coaching, access to the brand's Revivo program — a recommerce platform that offers repaired and reconditioned footwear — and a VivoBiome preview area that showcases Vivobarefoot's circular, made-to-measure footwear system"], "anchor_json": {"service_model": "全方位足部健康服务", "brand": "Vivobarefoot"}}, {"event_frame_id": "fec1b678-4f68-4f16-91aa-c4d4499a8947", "article_id": "ceb22526-b474-414a-ac45-28a10147b7a4", "source_name": "Footwear News", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "retail_expansion", "brand": "Vivobarefoot", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["Vivobarefoot's first U.S. flagship store, opening in June, will be located at 248 Lafayette Street in the SoHo neighborhood in N.Y.C.", "The U.S. flagship will be housed at a 1,500 square foot space at 248 Lafayette Street"], "anchor_json": {"store_type": "旗舰店", "market": "美国", "retail_format": "体验式零售概念", "brand": "Vivobarefoot"}}]}
